model.text:
I desire that my doctor make a concerted effort to return me to an acceptable quality of
life using then available treatments and therapies. However, if my quality of life
becomes unacceptable to me and my doctors have determined that
my condition will not improve (is irreversible), I direct that all treatments that extend my
life be withdrawn.

title.text: An unacceptable quality of life to me means:

options.value: Chronic coma or persistent vegetative state
No longer able to communicate my needs
No longer able to recognize family or friends
Total dependence on others for daily care
Even if I have the quality of life described above, I still wish to be treated with food and water by tube or intravenously
If I have the quality of life described above, I do NOT wish to be treated with food and water by tube or intravenously

model.text:
Some people do not wish to have certain life-sustaining treatments under any
circumstance, even if recovery is a possibility. Check treatments below, if any, that you
do not wish to have under any circumstances:

title.text: When I am near death, it is important to me that:

model.error: This field must contain a valid e-mail address.

title.text: I, being of sound mind and memory, do hereby make, publish, and declare this document as my Living Will to serve as a directive to my physicians, family, and healthcare providers in the event that I am unable to communicate my wishes regarding life-sustaining treatment.
